status_quo: Inventory shrinkage understated by 18% because POS adjustments lag warehouse cycle counts by 3-5 days. Markdown optimization runs on stale stock levels, eroding margin on high-velocity SKUs.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ reconciles POS transaction logs against warehouse management actuals. The governed pipeline surfaced 6 inventory discrepancies across 3 channels — providing a remediation roadmap before peak season planning.
